name: Spice Marble Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the cake flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Cream the shortening and sugar until fluffy.
3. Add the eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients and milk, alternating with stirring to combine thoroughly after each addition.
5. Divide the batter into two bowls.
6. To one bowl, mix in the cinnamon, cloves, nutmeg, and molasses.
7. Pour the light batter alternately with the dark batter into a greased loaf pan, creating an alternating pattern.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until firm to the touch.
9. Spread butter frosting over the top and sides of the cake.
10. Serve.
Makes 1 (8x8 inch) cake.
